deploy.startCommand: python -c "import os;open('.build-sha','w').write(os.environ.get('RAILWAY_GIT_COMMIT_SHA','unknown')[:12]) if not os.path.exists('.build-sha') or open('.build-sha').read().strip()=='unknown' else None" && python pre_deploy.py && flask db upgrade && gunicorn --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-5000} --workers 4 --threads 4 --timeout 180 --worker-class gthread --max-requests 1000 --max-requests-jitter 50 --preload -c gunicorn.conf.py server:app
